summary_one_line: Input must carry the 4-byte post-table version field equal to 0x00020000 to take the false branch and parse the v2 tail.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte post-table version field must equal the exact 32-bit constant 0x00020000 (bytes 00 02 00 00) at the version offset, so the equality test version != 0x00020000 fails and the function continues into v2 parsing instead of returning.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries the version bytes (00 02 00 00 at offset 0x17-0x1a window: 18 00 02 00 00), and the winner resolves 10/10 with hitcount 39 on the branch; the I2S stage in value_profile_cmplog substitutes the logged comparison operand 0x00020000 into the input.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile loser seeds do not place 0x00020000 at the version field (byte-diff offsets 0x17/0x19 show W=18/02 vs scattered L bytes), so version != 0x00020000 stays true and it blocks 10/10.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which reads the CmpLogObserver entry for the version != 0x00020000 comparison and substitutes the constant operand 0x00020000 directly into the input; plain value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only gets a coarse CMP_MAP distance bucket, which gives no gradient on an all-or-nothing 4-byte equality.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same 4-byte version field must reach 0x00020000; here the discriminating capability is the CMP_MAP closeness gradient that preserves intermediate inputs whose version operand is progressively nearer to the constant.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10 (hitcount 39) versus cmplog's 2/10 (hitcount 3); the winner's extra CMP_MAP gradient bucket signal preserves near-miss version inputs as corpus, accelerating convergence to the exact 0x00020000 magic.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has I2SRandReplace but no CMP_MAP gradient feedback, so it only resolves 2/10 and blocks 8/10 with avg duration 19.80h, lacking the closeness-bucket signal that rewards inputs approaching the constant.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog's CMP_MAP gradient feedback (Hamming-distance buckets on the integer compare) gives new coverage credit to inputs whose version operand is closer to 0x00020000, retaining stepping-stones cmplog discards; this distance-bucket feedback is the technique cmplog lacks.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is the equality test version != 0x00020000.
The blocked side is the false branch (continue into v2 parsing).
Pair 1 is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile with an I2S delta.
Winner resolves 10/10 with branch hitcount 39 on pair 1.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=39  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: Winner-resolving seeds carry the version bytes 00 02 00 00 after the table_length field.
The W-side byte at offset 0x19 is concentrated as 02 while loser bytes are scattered.
evidence_trail.cited_section: BYTE DIFF (W vs L at common offsets)

evidence_trail.claim: After resolving, the winner enters the v2 tail and parses glyphNameIndex via table->v2X.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of edge counters and the CMP buffer.
I2SRandReplace substitutes a logged CMP operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: Pair 2 is value_profile_cmplog beating cmplog with a value_profile delta.
On pair 2 the winner resolves 10/10 (hitcount 39) while cmplog resolves only 2/10 (hitcount 3).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=39  loser=3

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile/vpc CMP_MAP feedback preserves inputs whose operand pair is closer to matching as new corpus.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog's instrumentation includes the CMP_MAP gradient buckets that cmplog lacks.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5609 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 7253f27adf424cfd` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 21 of the 22-level ancestor chain, confirming an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the winner's lineage under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic 4-byte exact-equality magic gate where cmplog (I2S, no CMP_MAP) resolves as fast as value_profile_cmplog, showing the version constant is reachable by I2S substitution alone without any CMP_MAP gradient contribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The pair-2 attribution to CMP_MAP gradient is the weakest claim: an all-or-nothing 4-byte equality gives a coarse distance signal, so vpc's pair-2 edge over cmplog may partly reflect run-to-run variance rather than a clean gradient stepping-stone effect.
